room.caption: [Vault Shifting Rooms B] You just gotta think 4th dimensionally.

instance.creationCode: vaultString=" These tunnels are causing me to go mad. What have I done to deserve this?"

GID_SET(257039, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=192 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_A} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_C}

GID_SET(257040, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=944 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_A} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_C}

GID_SET(257041, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=1360 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_A} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_C}

GID_SET(257042, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=192 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_A} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_C}

GID_SET(257043, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=944 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_A} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_C}

GID_SET(257044, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=1360 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_A} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_C}

GID_SET(257045, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=8 newStep=5 newTrans=17 newMapX=640 newMapY=48 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_C} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_A}
